text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Foster Families > Camps * Foster Children 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Former Foster Children Foster Children Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF FOR THE CHILDREN ROYAL FAMILY KIDS CAMP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides camps and mentoring programs for children who have experienced abuse, neglect, or abandonment. Offers individual attention with one counselor for every one or two children. Locator Santa Ana, CA 92704 Eligibility: Children ages 6-12 in foster care with an active child welfare case Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (714) 438-2494 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON POST ADOPTION RESOURCE CENTER TRAINING CALENDARS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Oregon adoptive and assisted guardianship families with a schedule of support groups, parenting classes, and educational events 6443 SW Beaverton Hillsdale Highway Suite 205 Portland, OR 97221 Eligibility: ODHS adoptive and assisted guardianship families, or families who have adopted through any state foster care system Hours: Varies by training course Email (503) 241-0799 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON POST ADOPTION RESOURCE CENTER TRAINING CALENDARS
